module_description: Monitors system service state (running or stopped). Supports auto-remediation to automatically start or stop services to restore the expected state.

hints.service: System service name. If empty, the item key is used as the service identifier.
hints.expected: Expected state. An alert is triggered when the actual state differs.
hints.remediation: Automatically starts or stops the service to restore the expected state.

ui.discover_error: Could not load the list of system services
